rows.requirement: vector-RAG arm's final answer goes through the shared function
rows.mechanism: patches eval.pipeline.generate_final_answer, runs run_vector_rag_arm, asserts called exactly once

rows.requirement: GraphRAG-lite arm's final answer goes through the shared function
rows.mechanism: same patch target, run_graphrag_lite_arm, asserts called exactly once

rows.requirement: HiveMind arm's final answer goes through the shared function
rows.mechanism: same patch target, run_hivemind_arm, asserts called exactly once

rows.requirement: identical LLMClient.complete() call signature/model config across arms
rows.mechanism: spy LLMClient records all calls; last call per arm compared for model/temperature/max_tokens/timeout equality

rows.requirement: identical prompt template/synthesizer function reused, not a parallel implementation
rows.mechanism: mock.patch eval.pipeline.synthesize_answer (wraps=real fn); asserts call_count==3 and query_type/entities args identical literal values across all 3 calls

rows.requirement: generate_final_answer builds selected_markdown with ## File: headers synthesizer.py expects
rows.mechanism: pure-unit, no LLM: asserts header format + doc order + missing-id skip behavior

rows.test: manual (self-consistency.json) + grep for import openrouter/gemini/dotenv/os.environ in new files
rows.mechanism: grep-based self-consistency check, no test needed since absence is the assertion
